title: Tuna Sushi Rolls
description: Delicious and easy-to-make tuna sushi rolls, a classic Japanese dish. Perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Prepare sushi rice according to package instructions.
Cut cucumber and avocado into thin slices.
Lay a sheet of sushi nori flat on a sushi mat.
Spread a thin layer of sushi rice onto the nori, leaving a 1-inch border at the top.
Place a few slices of tuna, cucumber, and avocado in the middle of the rice.
Roll the sushi using the mat, applying gentle pressure.
Slice the roll into 8 equal pieces using a sharp knife.
Brush the tops with sesame oil and serve with soy sauce.
